_note: Internal-use-only candidate registry entries. Mirrors the rep test-page convention (RepAccount with official_id='test-civicview-internal' on prod) — these are clearly-fictional candidates used for end-to-end testing of the candidate page composer + dashboard + 2FA login flow without using a real candidate's name and photo (which would have the same impersonation risk that retired the rep demo seed).
_loader: Picked up automatically by ElectionsService._load_all(), which walks every subdirectory of app/data/. The folder name '_internal' is just a directory; there's no elections.json here, so only candidate records load (no fake races appear on any state's ballot tab).
_pairing: Each entry should have a matching CandidateAccount row in backend/demo_candidate_accounts.json (or the DEMO_CANDIDATE_ACCOUNTS_JSON env override) so the test candidate can sign in to manage 'their' page.

test-civicview-internal-candidate.name: CivicView Test Candidate
test-civicview-internal-candidate.bio: Internal test account for the CivicView team. Not a real candidate, not running for office. Used to exercise the candidate-page composer, dashboard, engagement, and 2FA login flow end-to-end without using a real candidate's identity.
